zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice d'Aubigny於大約1182年出生在英國越可爾納本時，她的父親William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir23歲，母親Margaret d'Umfraville31歲。她與Gilbert Gand結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice d'Aubigny于大约1182年出生在英国越可爾納本时，她的父亲William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir23岁，母亲Margaret d'Umfraville31岁。她与Gilbert Gand结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice d'Aubigny was born about 1182, in Naburn, Yorkshire, England, her father, William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir, was 23 and her mother, Margaret d'Umfraville, was 31. She married Gilbert Gand. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice d'Aubigny est née environ 1182, à Naburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret d'Umfraville, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert Gand. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elleenterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice d'Aubigny um 1182 in Naburn, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir 23 und ihre Mutter Margaret d'Umfraville 31. Sie hat Gilbert Gand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice d'Aubigny è nata il circa 1182 nel Naburn, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Margaret d'Umfraville, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert Gand. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice d'Aubignyが約1182年にイギリスヨークシュアイアナブルンで生まれた時，父William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoirは23歳，母Margaret d'Umfravilleは31歳であった。Gilbert Gandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice d'Aubigny(이)가 대략 1182년 영국 요르크실르 나번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret d'Umfraville(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Gilbert Gand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice d'Aubigny nasceu aproximadamente 1182, em Naburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret d'Umfraville, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert Gand. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice d'Aubigny родилась около 1182 г. в местности набурн, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret d'Umfraville, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Gand. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice d'Aubigny nació aproximadamente 1182, en Naburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret d'Umfraville, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Gilbert Gand. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
